name: the-pass
description: A public plugin-first review station for trading strategy research: specs, evidence, gates, audits, and receipts before paper or live approval.

interface.shortDescription: Trading strategy research gates, audits, and receipts.
interface.longDescription: The Pass is a public plugin-first workflow for turning trading ideas into structured hypotheses, evidence packages, independent reviews, and gate-based decisions before paper or live approval.
defaultPrompt: Set up this repo for The Pass.
Turn this trading idea into a StrategySpec.
Taste this backtest package for promotion risks.
